testcase.name: Verify onboarding screens and navigate to login
testcase.classname: Login Functionality
testcase.system-out:
✅ Driver initialized successfully
Scenario: Verify onboarding screens and navigate to login # src/test/resources/features/CustomerLogin/01_Login.feature:5 Given the app is launched # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_app_is_launched() And Verify the "Digitization" screen is displayed # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.verify_the_screen_is_displayed(java.lang.String) When the user clicks on Next # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_clicks_on_next() Then Verify the "World of Machines" screen should be displayed # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.verify_the_screen_should_be_displayed(java.lang.String) When the user clicks on Next again # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_clicks_on_next_again() Then Verify the "Accelerating Growth" screen should displayed # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.verify_the_screen_should_displayed(java.lang.String) When the user clicks on Finish # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_clicks_on_finish() Then Verify the "Login to Your Account" screen should be visible # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.verify_the_screen_should_be_visible(java.lang.String) When the user double taps on the APMS AI footer if needed # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_double_taps_on_the_apms_ai_footer_if_needed()

testcase.name: Verify user is able to login successfully
testcase.classname: Login Functionality
testcase.system-out: Scenario: Verify user is able to login successfully # src/test/resources/features/CustomerLogin/01_Login.feature:69 Given the user is on the login screen # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_is_on_the_login_screen() When the user enters email "anilkumar.m@apms.ai" # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_enters_email(java.lang.String) And the user enters password "1234" # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_enters_password(java.lang.String) And the user clicks on Login # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.the_user_clicks_on_login() Then Verify the user should be logged in successfully # StepDefinitions.configurations.login.LoginSteps.verify_the_user_should_be_logged_in_successfully() [AppHooks] On Dashboard — stopping
